citations.description: Says 'each along an independent axis and inert by default' — applies to drift-refresh (material freshness), a default-OFF claim in a non-ADR doc.
Says 'the path ships opt-in until a project confirms the per-token saving' — original body text in the Measurement section, not a dated ADR note.
Configuration table does not include a row for verify.progressive_drift_refresh, despite the ticket's '## What' identifying this as the 'three-floors table' to update.
Dated 'Update 2026-07-11' blockquote that says 'drift-refresh and the completion floor remain default-off' — this IS a dated ADR note and IS excepted, but the undated body text at line 91 is not.

findings.criterion: The stale-framing sweep leaves zero default-OFF claims about drift-refresh in src/, tests/, docs/ (dated ADR notes excepted).
findings.detail: Two residual default-OFF/opt-in framing claims about drift-refresh remain in docs/ that are not covered by the 'dated ADR notes excepted' carve-out. (1) docs/plan-review-gate.md:368 says 'each along an independent axis and inert by default' — the three-floor list at lines 366-368 explicitly names drift-refresh (material freshness) as one of the floors, making this a default-OFF claim about drift-refresh in a non-ADR doc file. (2) docs/adr/0002-code-drift-invalidation.md:91 says 'the path ships opt-in until a project confirms the per-token saving' — this is original body text in the Measurement section, NOT inside a dated blockquote/note, so it is not covered by the 'dated ADR notes excepted' exception (the only dated note in this ADR is the 'Update 2026-07-11' blockquote at lines 71-74, which is separately excepted). Additionally, the docs/plan-review-gate.md configuration table (lines 372-382) was identified in the ticket's '## What' as the 'three-floors table' to be swept, yet it has no row for verify.progressive_drift_refresh despite the feature now being default ON.
findings.remediation: Update docs/plan-review-gate.md:368 to reflect that drift-refresh is now default ON (e.g. 'novelty and drift-refresh are default ON; completion floor is default OFF'). Update docs/adr/0002:91-93 to strike 'ships opt-in until...' and replace with a note that the default was flipped ON 2026-07-12 (or wrap it in a dated note). Add a row for verify.progressive_drift_refresh (default: true) to the configuration table in docs/plan-review-gate.md.

data.remediation: How to resolve the unmet criteria: for each one, decide whether the work is genuinely incomplete or simply undocumented. If a requirement is already satisfied but the proof is not discoverable from the code alone, add a comment to this ticket that documents the evidence — cite the concrete artifacts that meet the requirement (file paths and line ranges, commands and their output, links, or the reasoning that ties the work to the criterion). The completion verifier reads this ticket's comments, so evidence you record there is taken into account on the next verification. For any criterion whose work is genuinely unfinished, complete it, then re-verify.
